package rulecoverage

func NegativeCsvReaderReuseRecord() string {
    ruleID := "csv_reader_reuse_record"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`csv.NewReader(r)` without `ReuseRecord = true` when records are processed one at a time and not stored"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
